footer.tagline: A web design studio building fast, accessible websites and brand identities.

newsletter.title: Ideas worth reading, once a month.
newsletter.text: Field notes on web design, brand and digital craft — no fluff, unsubscribe anytime.
newsletter.note: By subscribing you agree to receive occasional emails from Lumis Media.

hero.title: We design websites your audience actually wants to use.
hero.lead: Lumis Media designs and builds fast, accessible websites and brand identities for ambitious businesses — on every screen, in every language.
hero.card_text: New website launching for a client this quarter

home.marquee_eyebrow: Trusted by teams building bold brands

services_teaser.title: Websites and brand identities, done right.
services_teaser.text: From first sketch to final launch, we design, build and maintain websites that perform — for founders and growing businesses alike.

home.s1_text: Fast, accessible, multi-language websites designed to convert and easy to maintain.
home.s2_text: Positioning, naming and visual systems that give your brand a point of view.

testimonial.quote: Honestly, we didn't even want a website at first. Lumis Media convinced us — and completely exceeded our expectations. Now we love our new site.
testimonial.name: Medosa Café-Bar

final_cta.title: Have a project in mind?
final_cta.text: Tell us what you're building — we'll get back to you within one business day.

hero.title: Case studies, made with care.
hero.lead: As a young studio, this space will grow with every project we take on. Here's a first look at what a case study will look like.

work.p0_text: A moody, image-led website for a cocktail and coffee lounge in Ansbach, Germany, with a built-in table reservation flow.
work.p1_text: A ground-up identity and packaging system for a specialty roastery entering three new markets, paired with a new website.
work.p2_text: A fast, minimal portfolio site built to load instantly and showcase work beautifully on any device.
work.p3_text: A story-led website that lifted qualified leads by 64% in the first quarter.
work.p4_text: A bright, conversion-focused website relaunch for a growing coworking space, live in six weeks.
work.p5_title: Kindred Skincare — Brand identity & style guide
work.p5_text: A refreshed logo, color system and brand guidelines built to carry Kindred from packaging to web.

cta.title: Like what you see?
cta.text: Let's talk about your next project.

hero.title: Website design and brand identity, done right.
hero.lead: Thoughtful design and solid development, so your website looks great and works even better.

services.sv1_text: Fast, accessible, multi-language websites designed to convert and easy to maintain.
services.sv2_text: Positioning workshops, naming, logo systems and brand guidelines that hold up across every touchpoint.

process.title: A clear process, from brief to launch.
process.step1_text: We start with your goals, audience and competitive landscape before any design begins.
process.step2_text: A shared roadmap and scope so timelines, budgets and deliverables are agreed up front.
process.step3_text: Strategy becomes design, layout and copy — with regular check-ins, not surprise reveals.
process.step4_text: We ship, monitor performance and iterate based on what the data actually tells us.

cta.title: Not sure which service you need?
cta.text: Tell us about your goals — we'll recommend the right mix.

hero.title: A studio built by people obsessed with good websites.
hero.lead: We started Lumis Media to close the gap between brand strategy and the kind of website people actually enjoy using.

mission.title: Make every brand worth paying attention to.
mission.text_1: Lumis Media was founded on a simple idea: a beautiful brand means nothing if the website behind it is slow, confusing or forgettable. We bring brand thinking and solid web craft together under one roof.
mission.text_2: Today we design and build websites for founders and growing businesses across Europe — helping them make a strong first impression online.

values.title: The principles behind every project.
values.v1_text: We'd rather ship ten great pieces than a hundred forgettable ones.
values.v2_text: Numbers guide decisions; they don't replace taste and judgement.
values.v3_text: Clear scopes, honest timelines, and no surprise invoices.
values.v4_text: Accessible, multi-language work by default — not an afterthought.

team.title: Meet the people behind the work.
team.text: The two of us — building every project together, start to finish.

cta.title: Want to work with us?
cta.text: We're always open to meeting new brands and collaborators.

hero.title: Let's build something worth watching.
hero.lead: Tell us a little about your project and we'll get back to you within one business day.
